    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ControllerAddRemoveRoles
    Controls the add/remove roles screen.
    ControllerAdminHome
    Controls the admin home screen.
    ControllerFirstAdmin
    Controls the first-admin setup screen.
    ControllerMultipleRoleDispatch
    Controls the multiple-role dispatch screen.
    ControllerNewAccount
    Controls the new account screen.
    ControllerOneTimePassword
    Controls the one-time password screen.
    ControllerPostManagement
    Handles user actions for creating, viewing, editing, deleting, and replying to posts.
    ControllerReplyManagement
    Controller for handling reply-related actions from the UI.
    ControllerRole1Home
    Controls the role 1 home screen.
    ControllerRole2Home
    Controls the role 2 home screen.
    ControllerUserLogin
    Controls the login screen.
    ControllerUserUpdate
    Controls the user update screen.
    Database
    Manages the application's H2 database connection and queries.
    EmailRecognizer
    Validates email-style input with a finite-state-machine approach.
    FoundationsMain
    Starts the Foundations application and opens the first JavaFX screen.
    GUISingleRoleDispatch
    Sends a user to the correct home page when that user has only one role.
    Model
    Holds model support for the login screen.
    Model
    Holds model support for the user update screen.
    ModelAddRemoveRoles
    Holds model support for the add/remove roles screen.
    ModelAdminHome
    Holds model support for the admin home screen.
    ModelFirstAdmin
    Holds model support for the first-admin setup screen.
    ModelMultipleRoleDispatch
    Holds model support for the multiple-role dispatch screen.
    ModelNewAccount
    Holds model support for the new account screen.
    ModelPostManagement
    Stores post data used by the discussion board screens.
    ModelReplyManagement
    Stores reply data used by the reply screens.
    ModelRole1Home
    Holds model support for the role 1 home screen.
    ModelRole2Home
    Holds model support for the role 2 home screen.
    PasswordRecognizer
    Validates passwords against the project rules.
    Post
    Represents one discussion board post.
    PostStorage
    Stores posts in memory for the discussion board.
    Reply
    Represents a reply written for a post.
    ReplyStorage
    Stores replies in memory for the discussion board.
    User
    Represents one user account in the system.
    UserNameRecognizer
    Validates usernames with a finite-state-machine approach.
    ViewAddRemoveRoles
    Shows the screen used to add or remove roles from a user.
    ViewAdminHome
    Shows the main home screen for admin users.
    ViewCreatePost
    Shows the screen used to create a new post.
    ViewFirstAdmin
    Shows the first-run screen for creating the first admin account.
    ViewListUsers
    Shows the screen that lists registered users.
    ViewMultipleRoleDispatch
    Shows the screen where a user picks one of several roles.
    ViewNewAccount
    Shows the screen used to create a new account from an invitation code.
    ViewOneTimePassword
    Shows the screen used to assign a temporary password to a user.
    ViewPostManagement
    Shows the main discussion board screen.
    ViewReplyList
    Shows the replies for a selected post.
    ViewReplyManagement
    Shows the screen used to create a reply for a post.
    ViewRole1Home
    Shows the main home screen for role 1 users.
    ViewRole2Home
    Shows the main home screen for role 2 users.
    ViewUserLogin
    Shows the login screen for the application.
    ViewUserUpdate
    Shows the screen used to update account information.
